# Transcript

1596.5150057127942 543.6711291415969 4432.929760748847 672.2064838645978
1619.2285638638955 719.4354437111834 4387.910215668901 804.9100654319193
1543.4943184804824 842.2089102102808 4393.41547388103 954.1437483993304
